subcodes.first_line: O Herald of the Covenant! Thy recent letter was received. Thou didst write that which is today manifest before all eyes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منادی پیمان مکتوب اخیر وصول یافت مرقوم نموده بودید امروز بالعیان مکشوف
subcodes.subjects: @non-participation in politics, @business; financial; property matters, @alteration of the divine will [bada]
